extraction.one_line_summary: VAN DER HOORN Taco soloed from the early break with 3km remaining after Bora-Hansgrohe's aggressive pacing backfired spectacularly
tactical_patterns: SAGAN Peter's team Bora-Hansgrohe shelled MERLIER Tim by over-pacing, yet SAGAN still lost the sprint finish
Peloton catastrophically miscalculated VAN DER HOORN Taco's solo strength, maintaining 22s gap with 2km remaining despite chasing
GALLOPIN Tony and TOCCONI's late bridge attempt from peloton was caught, revealing lack of coordination behind breakaway

rider_signals.VAN DER HOORN Taco: positive: unemployed in December, won GT stage solo in May after attacking remnant breakaway under 3km
rider_signals.SAGAN Peter: negative: team paced aggressively on climbs to isolate sprinters but SAGAN could only manage third in reduced sprint
rider_signals.MERLIER Tim: negative: dropped with 20km remaining despite being defending stage winner, vulnerability on moderate gradients exposed
rider_signals.CIMOLAI Davide: positive: won reduced peloton sprint for second, outperformed favored sprinters on punchy finish
rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: negative: dropped on unclassified 7.1% climb with 15km remaining, losing time on GC contenders
